title: Free Comic Book Day
content:
{{Top|real}} [[File:FCBD_nodate.jpg|thumb|thumb|250px|Free Comic Book Day]] '''Free Comic Book Day''' is an annual day when [[Star Wars comic books|comic book]] retailers give out free one-shot issues. It began in [[2002]] and is held on the first Saturday in [[May]]. [[Dark Horse Comics]], [[IDW Publishing]], and [[Viz Media]] have released various ''[[Star Wars]]'' comics on Free Comic Book Day. ==''Star Wars'' releases== {| {{Prettytable}} ! colspan="3" |Color code key: |- |style="background-color:#FFBB60;" width="24%" align="center"|Collected (TPB) issue |style="background-color:#40CC40;" width="24%" align="center"|Released issue |style="background-color:#FFFF80;" width="24%" align="center"|Future issue |} ===[[Star Wars Legends|Legends]]=== {| {{Prettytable}} !
